patch.value: Sentry PM-CLI-2C: Node MaxListeners runtime warnings are promoted to high console errors
Classify Node runtime warnings captured by captureConsoleIntegration at capture time so system-only handled diagnostics stay observable without becoming release-blocking error groups.

Known Node runtime warning envelopes are downgraded to warning severity at Sentry capture time; unrelated console errors remain error-level; PM-CLI-2C is documented and no longer blocks the release reliability gate; focused and full coverage remain 100/100/100/100
Handled Node runtime diagnostics remain visible in Sentry without blocking daily release health as high-severity product failures.
PM-CLI-2C currently contains three handled system-only MaxListenersExceededWarning events from an external fuzz run and blocks the strict reliability gate.
Prevents a non-product runtime warning from halting automated releases while retaining diagnostic visibility.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Duplicate check: all-status searches for PM-CLI-2C, MaxListenersExceededWarning, Socket listeners, and Sentry runtime warning severity found no canonical item. Live Sentry event e5bd8887fae0472883916b4548f890fe shows three handled system-only Node warnings at 2026-07-17T11:19:46Z, with fuzz breadcrumbs and no in-app frames; related capture policy is pm-c8qa and fuzzing program is pm-0yi7.

author: codex-root
message: Start capture-time runtime warning severity fix

value.note: Capture-time Node runtime warning severity classification
Runtime warning and unrelated error regression coverage

value.author: codex-root
value.text: TDD evidence: reproduced the release-gate blocker as a failing beforeSend regression, then classified the exact Node MaxListenersExceededWarning console envelope as warning severity with pm.diagnostic_class=node_runtime_warning. Existing tags are preserved, message and exception forms are covered, and unrelated console errors remain error-level. Focused Sentry suite passes 48/48 and ESLint passes.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Live reliability evidence: PM-CLI-2C was resolved after root-cause capture and the strict Sentry/telemetry gate now passes with critical=0, high=0, 17 expected-handled groups, telemetry finish_error_rate_pct=0.3, and zero failures missing error_code. Full coverage passes 5,798 tests at exact 100/100/100/100; lint, zero clones, and static quality pass.

author: codex-root

patch.value: Strict live Sentry gate reports critical=0 and high=0 after resolving PM-CLI-2C; focused and full exact coverage pass.
Classified exact Node MaxListeners console envelopes as warning diagnostics at Sentry capture time while preserving unrelated errors.

message: Record verified Sentry resolution metadata before closure.

patch.value: Node runtime warnings remain observable without blocking release health; live Sentry and telemetry gates pass.
